title: BMOTD (V2 Alpha outnow!)
description: This is an beautiful MOTD Plugin for your Minecraft Server!
body:
![BMOTD LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e3ddfb87707e821cf76fa3e89eed316505e33e.png)
# **Elevate your server list with BMOTD!**
## Where can I use BMOTD? [![Paper](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fpaper_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/discover/plugins?g=categories:paper) [![Purpur](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fpurpur_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/discover/plugins?g=categories:purpur) [![Spigot](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fspigot_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/discover/plugins?g=categories:spigot) [![Bukkit](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fbukkit_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/discover/plugins?g=categories:bukkit) ## Which plattforms are planed? ![Velocity](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fvelocity_vector.svg&n=-1) ![BungeeCord](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fbungeecord_vector.svg&n=-1) ![Waterfall](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fwaterfall_vector.svg&n=-1) Welcome to [**BMOTD**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bmotd), the lightweight solution to make your server stand out. Featuring a simple yet powerful configuration, [**BMOTD**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bmotd) allows you to create stunning, automatically centered **MOTDs** using the modern [**MiniMessage**](https://github.com/KyoriPowered/adventure-text-minimessage?tab=readme-ov-file) format. 🎲 **Random MOTD Rotation** Why settle for one look? You can now define multiple **MOTD** sets in your config. Every time a player refreshes their server list, they'll see a different message! **Dynamic feeling** for your server. **Unlimited** MOTD variations. 🧩 **PlaceholderAPI Support** Full integration with **PlaceholderAPI (PAPI)**. Display real-time stats directly in your MOTD. Show player counts, server TPS, or even custom event variables. Note: Placeholders are parsed **before** centering to ensure perfect alignment. No more messing around with manual spaces – just toggle **always-middle** and let the plugin do the work for you!
Config ``` # BMOTD Configuration language: "de" always-middle: false # MOTDs motds: - line1: "EinfachBen" line2: "Das ist ein Test" - line1: "🔥 PvP EVENT 🔥" line2: "Join jetzt auf dem Server!" - line1: "BMOTD Plugin" line2: "Jetzt mit Random-Rotation!" ```
Example: ![server example 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81f1c46acefab5308f6a68e54de54efb37c34ffd.png) ![server example 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd632024774c7c0b7279a678c855ab3bd2a597b9.png) ![server example 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/912f4867eb59ad1bd478968dabef815a785bf053.png) ![server example 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891dfff1b579c8bd40240c36e893fe037b5cbbd1.png)
